jobs.prompt: Treat the current working defaults in pending-decisions.md as the implementation defaults unless the user later changes them. Judge whether the proposal is ready enough for implementation discussion. Return concise Korean with sections: 판정 (COMPLETE 또는 NOT_READY) / 남은 blocker / 좋은 점.
Judge whether combat-facing docs are ready for implementation discussion. Return concise Korean with sections: 판정 (COMPLETE 또는 NOT_READY) / 남은 blocker / 좋은 점.
